features.name: Class distribution
features.story: Every class has the same number of clips, so the dataset is perfectly balanced. Plain accuracy is a fair headline metric and no class weighting is needed.

features.name: Loudness (RMS energy)
features.story: Sustained sources carry high, steady energy while transient sounds sit low. Here 'helicopter' is loudest and 'clock_tick' is quietest, so energy alone already separates several classes.

features.name: Brightness (spectral centroid)
features.story: Spectral centroid marks where the spectrum's center of mass sits. 'rain' skews high and bright while 'rooster' skews low, giving the model a cue that complements loudness.
